title: Sorden Datapack
description: This Datapack/Mod Adds Two New Types Of Warden To Minecraft!
body:
Guys Its My Second Datapack It Adds A New Warden To Minecraft Named Sorden And Another One Named Morden

The Sorden Features

1. Can Summon 1 Morden Every 60 Seconds

2. Attack Damage 60

3.Health 800

4. Scale 1.1 Of The Original Warden

The Morden Features

1. Attack Damage 50

2.Health 700

3. Scale 1.06 Of The Original Warden

Guys For RP

1. Optifine Required
